name: YouTube
description: Search videos, manage playlists, rate videos, and browse your YouTube library via the YouTube Data API v3
author: Robert (Deathwing)

auth.help_text: Requires a Google Cloud project: 1) Go to console.cloud.google.com, 2) Enable the YouTube Data API v3, 3) Create OAuth 2.0 Web Application credentials, 4) Add clawdroid://oauth/callback as an authorized redirect URI, 5) Replace client_id in this manifest with your Client ID.

tools.name: youtube_search
tools.description: Search YouTube for videos, channels, or playlists. Returns titles, channel names, IDs, and URLs.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of content to search: "video", "channel", or "playlist". Defaults to "video".

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Number of results to return (1–50). Defaults to 10.

test_cases.name: Search for videos
test_cases.user_prompt: Search YouTube for lo-fi music videos

tools.name: youtube_get_video
tools.description: Get detailed information about a YouTube video: title, channel, duration, view count, likes, comments, and description.

parameters.name: video_id
parameters.description: The YouTube video ID (the part after ?v= in the URL, e.g. dQw4w9WgXcQ).

test_cases.name: Get video details
test_cases.user_prompt: Get info about the YouTube video dQw4w9WgXcQ

tools.name: youtube_get_channel
tools.description: Get details about a YouTube channel: name, subscriber count, video count, total views, and description. Omit channel_id to get your own channel.

parameters.name: channel_id
parameters.description: The YouTube channel ID. Omit to retrieve your own channel details.

test_cases.name: Get my channel
test_cases.user_prompt: Show me my YouTube channel info

tools.name: youtube_list_my_playlists
tools.description: List all playlists on your YouTube channel, including video count and privacy status.

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of playlists to return (1–50). Defaults to 25.

test_cases.name: List my playlists
test_cases.user_prompt: Show me all my YouTube playlists

tools.name: youtube_get_playlist_items
tools.description: List the videos inside a YouTube playlist.

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of videos to return (1–50). Defaults to 25.

test_cases.name: Get playlist videos
test_cases.user_prompt: Show me videos in my favorites playlist

tools.name: youtube_add_to_playlist
tools.description: Add a video to one of your YouTube playlists.

parameters.name: playlist_id
parameters.description: The ID of the playlist to add the video to.

parameters.name: video_id
parameters.description: The YouTube video ID to add.

parameters.name: position
parameters.description: Zero-based position to insert the video at. Omit to append to end.

test_cases.name: Add video to playlist
test_cases.user_prompt: Add video dQw4w9WgXcQ to my Watch Later playlist

tools.name: youtube_create_playlist
tools.description: Create a new YouTube playlist on your channel.

test_cases.name: Create a playlist
test_cases.user_prompt: Create a private YouTube playlist called Study Music

tools.name: youtube_remove_from_playlist
tools.description: Remove a video from a playlist using its playlist item ID (returned by youtube_get_playlist_items).

parameters.name: playlist_item_id
parameters.description: The playlist item ID to remove (not the video ID — use youtube_get_playlist_items to find it).

test_cases.name: Remove from playlist
test_cases.user_prompt: Remove the first video from my cooking playlist

tools.name: youtube_rate_video
tools.description: Like or dislike a YouTube video, or remove your rating.

parameters.name: video_id
parameters.description: The YouTube video ID to rate.

tools.name: youtube_list_subscriptions
tools.description: List the YouTube channels you are subscribed to.

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of subscriptions to return (1–50). Defaults to 25.

test_cases.name: List subscriptions
test_cases.user_prompt: Show me the YouTube channels I'm subscribed to
